one_time_description: Agricultural Benefits Specific Claim settlement of $56,816,579, offset by gain on disposal of capital assets ($46,817,784), settlement per capita distributions ($4,699,000), legal fees ($3,656,582), and contribution to Agricultural Benefits Legacy Trust net $317,989; net other income $1,961,202
economic_notes: Nation owns bison operation (Kinistin Bison Inc.) and 102009262 Saskatchewan Ltd. as wholly owned subsidiaries. 14% ownership in STC Investments Limited Partnership and STC Casino Holdings Corporation. Member of Saskatoon Tribal Council Inc. and STC Health and Family Services Inc. Multiple capital projects underway including school upgrades, lagoon, sewage pumping station, bridge replacement, roads improvement, and CMHC rapid housing initiative.
notes: Large one-time Agricultural Benefits Specific Claim settlement of $56.8M recognized in 2024, with offsetting disposal of capital assets ($46.8M), per capita distributions ($4.7M), legal fees ($3.7M), and trust contribution; net other income $1.96M. Nation adopted PS 3400 Revenue standard prospectively April 1, 2023 with no restatement of prior periods. Two wholly owned subsidiaries consolidated: Kinistin Bison Inc. and 102009262 Saskatchewan Ltd. Contaminated site liability increased from $210,000 to $400,000. Prior year interest income line shows negative ($241,106) which appears to be a restatement/reclassification. Nation is in net debt position of $7,547,005. Schedule of remuneration not included in extracted text.
